calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Q-012 control constraint necessity (REE_FULL vs PREDICTIVE_ONLY)
items.notes: EXP-0062. Q-012 replication at 2x EXQ-152 scale. REE_FULL vs PREDICTIVE_ONLY vs NO_LEARNING. 3 seeds x 3 conditions x 300 episodes x 300 steps.

items.title: ARC-030 benefit_eval_head with phased training (resource proximity)
items.notes: Re-run of EXQ-180 with phased training. EXQ-180 showed probe_r2=0.619 (z_world encodes resource proximity) but benefit_ratio=0.29x (head trained jointly couldn't exploit it). Fix: P0 E1+E2 warmup (200 eps), P1 freeze encoder + train head on detached z_world (100 eps), P2 eval with benefit_eval in E3 (200 eps). 3 seeds, resource_field_view.max() labels.
